top_signals.title: Tesla stock sinks 7% despite strong deliveries report, posting worst day in nearly a year
top_signals.summary: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
